detail.Title: 2027 | Americas | New York | Engineering | Software Engineer Intern
detail.PrimaryLocation: New York, New York, United States
detail.ExternalDescriptionStr:
Engineering Summer Analysts build software and platforms used across the firm. You will work with engineers on distributed systems, data pipelines, and production services in Java, Python, and C++.

We are looking for students pursuing a BS or MS in Computer Science with strong fundamentals in algorithms and systems programming.
detail.ExternalResponsibilitiesStr: Design, implement, and test software with mentorship from senior engineers.
detail.ShortDescriptionStr: Campus engineering summer analyst role in New York.
